PropertyInt.name: sessionsPerTunnel
PropertyInt.help: Number of sessions per L2TP tunnel
PropertyInt.description: Number of sessions per L2TP tunnel

choices.help: Ordering method for tunnel and session creation
choices.description: Ordering method for tunnel and session creation

PropertyInt.name: sourceUdpPort
PropertyInt.help: UDP port to employ for tunneling sources
PropertyInt.description: UDP port to employ for tunneling sources

PropertyInt.name: destinationUdpPort
PropertyInt.help: UDP port to employ for tunneling destinations
PropertyInt.description: UDP port to employ for tunneling destinations

PropertyBoolean.name: enableDataChecksum
PropertyBoolean.help: If checked, UDP checksum is enabled on data plane packets
PropertyBoolean.description: Enable/disable UDP checksums on data plane packets

PropertyBoolean.name: enableControlChecksum
PropertyBoolean.help: If checked, UDP checksum is enabled on control plane packets
PropertyBoolean.description: Enable/disable UDP checksums on control plane packets

PropertyBoolean.name: enableAvpHiding
PropertyBoolean.help: If checked, Attribute Value Pair hiding is enabled

PropertyString.name: tunnelAuthMode
PropertyString.help: Enables or disables L2TP tunnel authentication

PropertyString.name: localHostName
PropertyString.help: L2TP Local host name to be used in authentication
PropertyString.description: L2TP Local host name used during authentication

PropertyString.name: secret
PropertyString.help: L2TP secret to be used in authentication

PropertyString.name: peerHostName
PropertyString.help: L2TP peer host name to be used in authentication
PropertyString.description: L2TP peer host name used durint authentication

PropertyInt.name: noCallTimeout
PropertyInt.help: Timeout for no call establishment, in seconds
PropertyInt.description: Timeout for no call establishment, in seconds

PropertyBoolean.name: enableOffsetBit
PropertyBoolean.help: If checked, offset bit is enabled in L2TP data packets
PropertyBoolean.description: If enabled, offset bit is enabled in L2TP data packets

PropertyInt.name: offsetLen
PropertyInt.help: L2TP offset length in bytes. Applicable only if offset bit set.

PropertyInt.name: offsetByte
PropertyInt.help: L2TP offset byte. Applicable only if offset bit is set.

PropertyBoolean.name: enableLengthBit
PropertyBoolean.help: If checked, length bit is set in L2TP data packets.
PropertyBoolean.description: If enabled, length bit set in L2TP data packets.

PropertyBoolean.name: enableSequenceBit
PropertyBoolean.help: If checked, sequence bit is set in L2TP data packets.
PropertyBoolean.description: If enabled, sequence bit is set in L2TP data packets.

PropertyBoolean.name: enableRedial
PropertyBoolean.help: If checked, L2TP redial is enabled
PropertyBoolean.description: If enabled, L2TP redial is activated

PropertyInt.name: redialMax
PropertyInt.help: Maximum number of L2TP redial attempts
PropertyInt.description: Max number of L2TP redial attempts

PropertyBoolean.name: enableHello
PropertyBoolean.help: If checked, L2TP hello request is enabled
PropertyBoolean.description: If enabled, L2TP hello request is performed

PropertyInt.name: helloTimeout
PropertyInt.help: Timeout for L2TP hello request, in seconds
PropertyInt.description: Timeout for L2TP hello request, in seconds
